basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Post Graduate Degree with integrated PG degrees and 3 years relevant experience OR PhD. OR Second Class Post Graduate Degree with integrated PG degrees, PhD and 3 years experience.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical): First class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees with three years of relevant experience or PhD. Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees, with PhD and three years' experience. Desirable: Research and/or work experience in emergency medicine/care.

salary_details.details: Salary as per ICMR, New Delhi.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical): First class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees with three years of relevant experience or PhD. Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees, with PhD and three years' experience. Desirable: Research and/or work experience in emergency medicine/care.

AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 04-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include a First Class Post Graduate Degree with integrated PG degrees and 3 years of relevant experience, or a PhD. Alternatively, a Second Class Post Graduate Degree with integrated PG degrees, a PhD, and 3 years of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your bio-data and relevant documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary for this position will be as per ICMR, New Delhi guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical).

faq.question: Q7. What is the type of job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
